src: Laravel Process Approval is a Laravel package that makes it easy to add approvals to your Laravel application. It allows you to define approval workflows for any model, and it provides a simple and easy-to-use API/UI for managing approvals.
ja: Laravel Process ApprovalはLaravelアプリケーションに承認機能を簡単に追加できるLaravelパッケージ。任意のモデルに承認ワークフローを定義でき、承認管理のためのシンプルで使いやすいAPI/UIを提供。
